'''fakaga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabbitwood|rabbitwood]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-k-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabbitwood|rabbitwood]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fakaga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fækægæth|fækægæth]] || [[word:fækægæj|fækægæj]] || [[word:fækægæsh|fækægæsh]] || [[word:fækægæ|fækægæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fakakagath|fakakagath]] || [[word:fakakagaj|fakakagaj]] || [[word:fakakagash|fakakagash]] || [[word:fakakaga|fakakaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fakagath|fakagath]] || [[word:fakagaj|fakagaj]] || [[word:fakagash|fakagash]] || [[word:fakaga|fakaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fakafgath|fakafgath]] || [[word:fakafgaj|fakafgaj]] || [[word:fakafgash|fakafgash]] || [[word:fakafgaf|fakafgaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fakagatha|fakagatha]] || [[word:fakagaja|fakagaja]] || [[word:fakagasha|fakagasha]] || [[word:fakagaka|fakagaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fakagath|fakagath]] || [[word:fakagaj|fakagaj]] || [[word:fakagash|fakagash]] || [[word:fakaga|fakaga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fakagathal|fakagathal]] || [[word:fakagajal|fakagajal]] || [[word:fakagashal|fakagashal]] || [[word:fakagakal|fakagakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fakagathatha|fakagathatha]] || [[word:fakagajaja|fakagajaja]] || [[word:fakagashasha|fakagashasha]] || [[word:fakagaka|fakagaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fakagathan|fakagathan]] || [[word:fakagajan|fakagajan]] || [[word:fakagashan|fakagashan]] || [[word:fakagakan|fakagakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fakagathaoro|fakagathaoro]] || [[word:fakagajaoro|fakagajaoro]] || [[word:fakagashaoro|fakagashaoro]] || [[word:fakagakaoro|fakagakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
